article_title: Update to packaged sales from a manufacturer on-site store

briefs.title: Manufacturers with On-Site Store Endorsement Can Now Sell Packaged Liquor Across Their Entire Site
briefs.summary: BC manufacturers with an on-site store endorsement may now sell packaged liquor almost anywhere on their manufacturing site, including via mobile point-of-sale. Sales remain prohibited in picnic-only areas, driveways, parking lots, and co-located businesses (unless same-licensee food- or liquor-primary).
briefs.action_required: No application needed — review the updated rules to ensure your sales locations and methods comply with the new restrictions.
briefs.article_title: Update to packaged sales from a manufacturer on-site store
